items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the walk-up QR booking feature, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for walk-up QR booking, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this feature being tested or validated. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively assessed based on the available information.
